description: Tiefen-Schicht — Szenen, Credits, Räume, Sonic-Paletten, Timelines, Kunstprinzipien. Ergänzt orbit_verflechtungen.json.

reference_scan_entry.role: Knoten im ersten Referenz-Scan — hohe Dokumentationsdichte, kein ORBIT-Zentrum

collab_lolsnake_metal_mag.title: Lolsnake × Sven Marquardt — Metal Magazine
collab_lolsnake_metal_mag.mood_brief: Aftermath of a party — behind the scenes after DJ set; vulnerable, honest, almost fragile space

visual_semantics.paradox: Marquardt ist analog-bw-Künstler — hier bewusst texture + contrast + colour als Bild der DJ-Musik
visual_semantics.berghain_parallel: Raw and honest wie Tür-Policy — ästhetische Integrität statt Pose

creative_process.origin: Social Media — Lolsnake decade+ Berghain regular, never met IRL first
creative_process.method: Free-flowing; ideas exchanged but leaned into mutual strengths; no over-structuring
creative_process.lolsnake_quote_logic: Clear inner vision, but collaborative orbit around it — other person's input = most interesting results

downstream.groove_podcast_508: Photo credit Sven Marquardt; 3h reimagined set — ethereal dub ↔ straightforward techno
downstream.numero_nl_interview: In Conversation with Lolsnake — collab as transformative, perspective-challenging

architecture.position: Side of Lab.Oratory entrance; facing naked-man statue at main stairs
architecture.design: More meticulous than main floor + Panorama; separate entablatures; minimalist wooden arches
architecture.lighting: Monochrome hues on concrete pillars synced to music; sustained RED ceiling + back wall — industrial piping in relief
architecture.orbit_signal: Red-filter immersive — connects to studio1111berlin art_club grammar

programming.weekend: Chill/rest area during Klubnacht — sometimes live act
programming.thursday: Independent series since June 2023 relaunch; experimental + leftfield + queer
programming.weeeirdos_slot: June 8 2023: Abyss X, Chippy Nonstop, Miss Parker, Schacke
programming.door: Normal Selection — vibe + audience balance curated

weeeirdos_in_saeule.platform_logic: Emerging local artists from underrepresented groups; visibility via Säule as stepping-off point
weeeirdos_in_saeule.sonic_range: Metallic techno, angelic trance, squishy acid, cosmic bleep — maelstrom of textures

_lolsnake_.not: ORBIT FLOW — zu leftfield/peak für Panorama-Logik

sonic_palette.marquardt_adjacent_dj: Christoph Faust — already in ORBIT CORE; house-minimal bridge

aesthetics.grade: High contrast; grain optional; colour allowed in weave only
aesthetics.typography: WEEEIRDOS ☯ ☻ — maximal flyer vs Marquardt minimal bio

music.after: ORBIT CORE edge — reduced house comedown
music.bpm_hint: 124-132 ORBIT zone vs 135+ SYSTEM peak moments

art.format: Portrait-as-exhibition — Metal Mag editorial = gallery spread
art.2017_origin: Weeeirdos began as live music + performance + visual art hybrid

film.edit_rhythm: Hypnotic slow cut for Marquardt frames; faster for WEEEIRDOS Boiler Room
film.reference_duration: 30s teaser / 3h groove podcast as longform pole

marketing.credit_block: Photo: Sven Marquardt | Talent: Lolsnake | Styling: Danny Muster | MUA: Saskia Krause | Loc: Haus der Visionäre
marketing.announce_pattern: Platform first (@weeeirdos) → residency (@saeule_berlin) → lineup → door policy

timeline.event: WEEEIRDOS moves to Säule residency; Boiler Room Berlin
Marquardt × Lolsnake Metal Magazine shoot — Haus der Visionäre

project.title: Heartbroken
project.subtitle: Wagner × Electronic × Photography
project.source_material: Der Ring des Nibelungen — urban technoid dubby reinterpretation

creative_logic.schneider: Urban, technoid, dubby — dark and mysterious; not clinging to Wagner literally
creative_logic.marquardt: Dark space for visuals; bridge festival tradition ↔ club/electronic culture
creative_logic.connection_prior: Schneider inspired by Marquardt exhibition Disturbing Beauty — photography already Wagnerian
creative_logic.gesamtwerk: One experience — photos projected while Schneider DJ sets; staged together

ep.title: Heartbroken EP
ep.character: Not dancefloor-oriented; most emotional/introspective Schneider work

visual_music_binding.projection: Marquardt photographs on stage during live set
visual_music_binding.mood: Dark, mysterious, dystopian Nibelungen — raw emotional immersive
visual_music_binding.wagner_marquardt_bridge: Operatic scale + club darkness — same bleak-intimate ORBIT core
visual_music_binding.orbit_playlist: ORBIT MOMENT DEEP exclusively — not SYSTEM, not FLOW

music.avoid: Peak techno — this is opera-house not Säule

art.format: Interdisciplinary live — museum-quality photo × DJ × opera vocal

film.document: Felsenreitschule performance doc — slow, dark, projected stills
film.not: Club doc flash — institutional camera distance

marketing.institution_voice: Festival tradition meets innovation — bridge narrative
marketing.dual_billing: Anja Schneider (music) + Sven Marquardt (visual atmosphere) — equal credit
marketing.press_angle: Berghain door + Wagner — Kurier/Queer Salzburg framing

gesamtwerk_template.title: Heartbroken — Wagner × Club × Galerie
checklist: Musik: ORBIT MOMENT DEEP Pool — dubby, technoid, emotional
Kunst: Projektion SW-Porträts im dunklen Raum
Film: Institutional doc tone — Felsenreitschule scale
Marketing: Dual credit + festival bridge narrative
Ästhetik: Disturbing Beauty / Wagnerian dark portrait grammar
Prinzipien: transzendenz (Opernhaus-Skala) + gesamtwerk (Projektion × Set) + katharsis (emotional, nicht dancefloor)

timeline.event: Schneider receives Salzburg Easter Festival request — Wagner electronic evening

Premiere Felsenreitschule 2 Apr; Heartbroken EP pt.1

gstar_voo_11plus1.depth: fashion × club × gallery — Berlin Art Week

project.concept: 12 portraits — 11 street-scouted talents + Clara Cuvé; club culture as fashion homage

gstar_voo_11plus1.marquardt_quote_logic: Homage to club culture — emotion, togetherness, closeness, fleeting moments — not commerce first

branch_binding.aesthetics: Portrait series — each talent different fashion personality
branch_binding.fashion_berlin: voostore as venue — concept store + gallery

nachtblende_slide.depth: immersive AV — Foto × Sound × Licht × Raum

exhibition_content.marquardt_arc: Punk/new wave 80s → pause after 1989 → return late 90s → Berghain 2004
